Education & Certification

A strong foundation in design and continuous learning help me deliver high-quality and modern creative solutions. Here are my educational background and certifications that support my work.

My academic background in Information Technology and related fields has helped me build a strong foundation, with strong results in ICT (A at O/L, C at A/L).
